svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="J4rOrjZ5uEIYS-cAwV19"> <mxGraphModel dx="791" dy="1091" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
!theme spacelab

title <b>Deployment Architecture</b>

node \"Client Machine\" #D6EAF8 {
 component Browser
}

node \"Application Server\" #D5F5E3 {
 component SpringBoot
 component Thymeleaf
}

node \"AI Server\" #FAD7A0 {
 component PythonAI
 component FAISS
 component LLM
}

node \"Database Server\" #E8DAEF {
 component MongoDB
}

Browser --> SpringBoot
SpringBoot --> Thymeleaf
SpringBoot --> PythonAI
PythonAI --> FAISS
FAISS --> LLM
SpringBoot --> MongoDB

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="s31tFLLTC1g4qOQDU-kv-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="726" width="631" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
